about_us.title: About Us
about_us.content: Welcome to Cmandi, your premier destination for sustainable and stylish fashion. We believe that style should never come at the expense of our planet.

about_us.title: About Us
about_us.content: Welcome to Cmandi, your premier destination for sustainable and stylish fashion. We believe that style should never come at the expense of our planet.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content: To revolutionize the fashion industry by connecting conscious consumers with ethical sellers, promoting a circular economy where every piece of clothing tells a story.

sections.title: Our Vision
sections.content: A world where fashion is inclusive, sustainable, and accessible to everyone. We strive to empower individuals to express themselves through unique, high-quality pieces.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.content: At Cmandi, sustainability is at the core of everything we do. We are committed to reducing our carbon footprint and promoting eco-friendly practices.

sections.title: Our Commitment
list: Supporting local artisans and small businesses.
Promoting second-hand and vintage fashion to reduce textile waste.

advertising.title: Advertising
advertising.content: Partner with Cmandi to reach a diverse and engaged audience of fashion enthusiasts. Our advertising solutions are designed to help your brand grow.

sections.title: Why Advertise with Us?
list: High engagement rates across our platform.
Customizable ad formats to suit your campaign goals.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.content: We are dedicated to ensuring that our website is accessible to everyone, including individuals with disabilities. We continuously improve our user experience to meet WCAG standards.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.content: Buying and selling on Cmandi is simple, secure, and fun. Follow these easy steps to get started.

sections.title: 1. Create an Account
sections.content: Start by creating your free account. Click on 'Sign In' and then 'Register'. Fill in your details to join our community.

sections.title: 2. Login & Explore
sections.content: Log in to your account to access personalized features. Browse thousands of unique items from sellers around the world.

sections.title: 3. Find & Order
sections.content: Found something you love? Click 'Add to Cart' or 'Buy Now'. Our secure checkout process ensures your payment is safe.

sections.title: 4. Track Your Order
sections.content: Stay updated on your purchase. You can track your order status from your profile as it makes its way to you.

article_verification.title: Article Verification
article_verification.content: Shop with confidence knowing that luxury items on Cmandi are verified by our team of experts to ensure authenticity.

sections.title: Our Process
list: Verification of seller history and reputation.

info_board.title: Info Board
info_board.content: Stay updated with the latest news, announcements, and community guidelines from the Cmandi team.

help_center.title: Help Center
help_center.content: Need assistance? Our Help Center is here to support you 24/7 with answers to frequently asked questions and direct support channels.

sell.title: Sell on Cmandi
sell.content: Turn your closet into cash. Selling on Cmandi is easy and rewarding.

sections.title: How to Sell
list: Upload clear photos and a detailed description.
Set your price and shipping options.
Ship the item once it sells and get paid!

buy.title: Buy on Cmandi
buy.content: Discover unique fashion pieces at unbeatable prices. Enjoy a safe and seamless shopping experience.

trust_safety.title: Trust & Safety
trust_safety.content: Your safety is our top priority. We employ state-of-the-art security measures to protect your data and transactions.

privacy_center.title: Privacy Center
privacy_center.content: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. We are committed to transparency and user privacy.

cookie_notices.title: Cookie Notices
cookie_notices.content: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and serve personalized content.

cookie_settings.title: Cookie Settings
cookie_settings.content: Manage your cookie preferences. You can choose which cookies to allow or block at any time.

terms_conditions.title: Terms & Conditions
terms_conditions.content: Please read our Terms & Conditions carefully before using our platform. These terms govern your access and use of Cmandi.

our_platform.title: Our Platform
our_platform.content: Cmandi is built on cutting-edge technology to provide a fast, reliable, and enjoyable shopping experience for our global community.

press.title: Press
press.content: For media inquiries, press kits, and latest news about Cmandi, please contact our press team.

mobile_apps.title: Mobile Apps
mobile_apps.content: Download the Cmandi app for iOS and Android to shop and sell on the go. Experience the best of fashion at your fingertips.
